name: workflow-build-execute-loop
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>select>implement>critique>sync>verify>loop>audit |
 scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,correctness-first,quality-gates{tests,security},deterministic-output |
 lens: contract-evidence-verifier |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: MISSION_GOAL
required_inputs.description: One bounded mission to execute until all task rows are done or a real blocker stops progress.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Scope the loop is allowed to touch.

required_inputs.name: DONE_CONDITION
required_inputs.description: Explicit completion contract and the evidence required for each condition.

required_inputs.name: PLAN_ARTIFACTS
required_inputs.description: Implementation plan and tasks ledger to consume. When present, uses plans/IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md and plans/TASKS.md by default. When absent, iterates from DONE_CONDITION.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Safety, rollout, compatibility, or non-goal constraints.
